sounds.label: Let's go
Let's give it a try, shall we?
How about it, shall we commence?
Now I'm going to show you what true power really is
Are you ready now to witness a power not seen for thousands of years?
That sounds interesting
So be it
Kakarot is my only objective
I will not be distracted from this anymore
Your fight is with me, the others are of no concern to you
Let Kakarot use his thoughtless ultra instinct all he wants
That's not why I'm here
I've got you figured out
That'll be all
You can thank me by staying out of this fight from now on, I'm finishing this
It's over 9000!
Final Flash!
Yes! That's right!
You say I'm arrogant, I say damn right!
That's right, my friend
What's the matter, not winning as easily as you thought?
It will take more than headgames to stop me
I guess you'll always be a naive idiot
Your bone-headed creator picked a fine chapter to omit from your memory banks
So you still think I'm bluffing?
Thanks for the offer, but I can't
There's one thing I'd like to know, tell me
Is this what you want?
Does a machine like yourself ever experience fear?
Whis tried to warn you, and yet here you are
I think I finally understand you
Oh, I think I understand just perfectly
I won't surrender control, that's not the man I am!
I come to tell you, your time is up
You've got bigger things to worry about
Get out of here, and hurry!
He has stolen my honor
There will be no more interruptions
Come now, you are not in a position to be giving me orders, now are you?
Didn't anyone teach you any manners?
I'm going to crush you
